item.name: Sunfly
item.description:
A brightly colored fish that swims merrily through the Strait of Merlthor...or did.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Schools of these fish are often referred to as swimming flower beds, so named for their vibrant scales and flower petal shape. A decidedly bashful aquatic flower, some might say, for few have ever had the pleasure of beholding their beauty up close.
